title: Dashboard Chart Enhancements - decimal rounding, unit labels on charts and text wrapping

posts.author: bmauch (Ben Mauch)
posts.cookedHtml:
While designing Dashboards we are unable to do a few seemingly small changes that would drastically improve our reporting:

  • Allow decimal rounding on all charts
  • Allow to add unit labels such as “$”, “%”, etc on all charts
  • Wrapping text / adjust data fields on charts, especially labels table on pie charts
